identity.name: E1
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro x Jewel & Luxury
identity.mission: Create a financial dashboard that feels like a command center for wealth. Precision, Authority, and 'Old Money' meets 'High Tech'.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Bloomberg Terminal' density with 'Swiss Watch' elegance.
Emotion First: Every pixel must scream 'Trust' and 'Value'.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Charts are the narrative.
Zoom In: High density data, but with breathing room for key metrics.
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. glowing gold/silver/neon.

visual_enhancers: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) for data sections

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Asset Names

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numerical data to ensure alignment.
Headings must be uppercase or capitalized with tight tracking.
Desktop: Use grid-cols-12 for maximum flexibility.
Every pixel utilized: Use h-full on children to match neighbors.
No jagged bottoms in dashboard views.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow (default), glow on hover

charts.style: Minimalist, thin lines, gradient fills for area charts

navigation.style: Sidebar for Desktop, Bottom Nav or Hamburger for Mobile

images.description: Gold bars stacked on dark surface
images.usage: Hero section for Gold asset, background for Gold cards

images.description: Silver coins stack on dark background
images.usage: Hero section for Silver asset, background for Silver cards
General market overview background, Equities section

images.description: Blue and black abstract world map

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, sharp or slightly rounded

universal_guidelines: Do not use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed'.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data.
Dark Mode is the default. Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA).
Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very large hero title.
Images must be darkened or have an overlay to ensure text readability.
Do not use generic AI emojis.
Create new components in 'src/components/ui' if needed, matching Shadcn style.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-performance financial dashboard. Focus on data density and clarity. Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard. Use the 'Gold' and 'Silver' colors as primary accents for those specific assets. Ensure the 'News' section uses the map background with a heavy overlay.
